caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey stylized hairstyle, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. He is wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He sits behind a black microphone, looking downward with a focused expression. To his left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a small microphone icon. In the background, several framed photographs are mounted on the wall, and a white appliance sits near a clothing rack. Across the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, with slight movements in his head and facial expression as he looks down. The scene maintains a consistent composition throughout, with the man centrally positioned and the surrounding environment remaining still.
